name: article (fast+content)
noteContentFormat:
<%*

const dv = this.app.plugins.plugins["dataview"].api
const getRelevantPages = (tag) => dv.pages(tag).where(p => p.file.frontmatter.relevant === true).file.name.map(p => `[[${p}]]`)

const data = {
  category: getRelevantPages("#system/category"),
  meta: getRelevantPages("#system/high/meta"),
  problem: getRelevantPages("#system/high/problem")
}

setTimeout(() => {
  app.fileManager.processFrontMatter(tp.config.target_file, (frontmatter) => {
    Object.entries(data).forEach(([key, value]) => {
      if (value.length > 0) frontmatter[key] = value
    })
  })
}, 300)

%>

<%*
const template = `---
tags:
  - mark/addition/aggregator
---

{{content|replace:("`":"\\`","\\":"\\\\","${":"\\${")}}
`;

await tp.file.create_new(template, "{{title|safe_name}}" + " - content", false, "base/additions");
-%>
